c1.descriptionRaw: After <color=#FFD780FF>Still Photo: Comprehensive Confirmation</color> heals a character, it will mark them with Verification, which will heal them once every 2s for 80% of Charlotte's ATK. This effect lasts 6s.
c1.name: A Need to Verify Facts

c2.descriptionRaw: When using <color=#FFD780FF>Framing: Freezing Point Composition</color>, when Monsieur Verite hits 1/2/3 (or more) opponents, Charlotte's own ATK will be increased by 10%/20%/30% for 12s.
c2.name: A Duty to Pursue Truth

c3.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Still Photo: Comprehensive Confirmation</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c3.name: An Imperative to Independence

c4.descriptionRaw: When <color=#FFD780FF>Still Photo: Comprehensive Confirmation</color> hits an opponent marked by Snappy Silhouette or Focused Impression, it will deal 10% more DMG and restore 2 Energy to Charlotte. This restoration can be triggered 5 times every 20s.
c4.name: A Responsibility to Oversee

c5.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Framing: Freezing Point Composition</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c5.name: A Principle of Conscience

c6.descriptionRaw: When the active character's Normal and Charged Attacks hit an opponent marked by <color=#FFD780FF>Framing: Freezing Point Composition</color>'s Focused Impression, Monsieur Verite will initiate a coordinated attack that deals 180% of Charlotte's ATK as <color=#99FFFFFF>AoE Cryo DMG</color> and heals active character(s) within the AoE for 42% of Charlotte's ATK. This effect can be triggered once every 6s and both DMG and healing dealt in this way will be considered as having been done by Charlotte's Elemental Burst.
c6.name: A Summation of Interest

profile.description: Indefatigable reporter of The Steambird, constantly on the hunt for the "truth."
profile.name: Charlotte
profile.title: Lens of Verity

combat1.descriptionRaw:
<color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>
Taking aim at targets using Monsieur Verite, her custom Kamera, Charlotte performs up to 3 consecutive attacks, dealing <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color>.

<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>
Consumes a fixed amount of Stamina, and after a moment's preparation, will deploy Monsieur Verite to deal <color=#99FFFFFF>AoE Cryo DMG</color>.

<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>
Gathering the power of Cryo, Charlotte plunges toward the ground, dealing DMG to all opponents in her path and dealing <color=#99FFFFFF>AoE Cryo DMG</color> upon landing.

<color=#FFD780FF>Arkhe: Pneuma</color>
At certain intervals, upon using a Charged Attack, Charlotte will cause a Spiritbreath Thorn to descend and pierce opponents, dealing Pneuma-aligned <color=#99FFFFFF>AoE Cryo DMG</color>.
combat1.name: Cool-Color Capture

combat2.descriptionRaw: Using the keen instincts of an ace reporter, Charlotte uses her photography skills to produce different effects based on whether the ability is Tapped or Held. Tap Takes a snapshot using Monsieur Verite, dealing AoE Cryo DMG to opponents in front of her and applying Snappy Silhouette to a maximum of 5 opponents. During this effect's duration, it will deal Cryo DMG to affected opponents at intervals. Hold Popping Monsieur Verite's viewfinder open, Charlotte enters Composition Mode, and during this time, the viewfinder will expand as you hold until you reach a Finisher Frame state. In this state, Charlotte can move and change direction freely. When the hold state ends, Monsieur Verite will deal Cryo DMG to all opponents locked on within the viewfinder, and apply the same Snappy Silhouette as Tap Mode does to them. If you unleash this ability only after reaching Finisher Frame, you will instead apply Focused Impression, which lasts longer and deals more DMG, although the Skill CD will be longer. Composition Mode lasts a maximum of 15s and allows a maximum of 5 opponents to be selected. "Press photography requires simple shots with exceptional theming, but most of all, you need to have a knack for capturing the moment!"
combat2.name: Framing: Freezing Point Composition

combat3.descriptionRaw: Condensing ice to create The Steambird's signature, Charlotte creates a Newsflash Field that will deal AoE Cryo DMG and restores HP for all nearby party members based on Charlotte's ATK. Newsflash Field ·While the ability is active, Monsieur Verite will deal Cryo DMG at intervals to opponents within its AoE. ·Will continuously restore HP to active character(s) within its AoE based on Charlotte's ATK. "Hearing stories from multiple perspectives to recreate what really happened is key to a good report... I mean, that's how you can pick the best angle for your article!"
combat3.name: Still Photo: Comprehensive Confirmation

passive1.descriptionRaw: When opponents marked by "Focused Impression" are defeated, <color=#FFD780FF>Framing: Freezing Point Composition</color>'s CD will be decreased by 2s. This CD decrease can be triggered 4 times every 12s.
passive1.name: Moment of Impact

passive2.descriptionRaw: When the party contains 1/2/3 Fontainians other than herself, Charlotte gains a 5%/10%/15% Healing Bonus. When the party contains 1/2/3 non-Fontainians, Charlotte gains a 5%/10%/15% Cryo DMG Bonus.
passive2.name: Diversified Investigation

passive3.descriptionRaw: After activating the Special Analysis Zoom Lens, Charlotte's "Framing: Freezing Point Composition" Hold Mode cannot trigger its original effects, but instead enables her to take photos in a rather unique manner...
passive3.name: First-Person Shutter
